data.description:
**About Team**

Corporate IT is the backbone of our business. Our team helps Sea develop a competitive advantage through defining our technology objectives, assessing solution options, and devising technical solutions that help us achieve both strategic goals and meet operational requirements. As a part of our team, you’ll help deliver seamless IT experiences and support to our employees at Sea by providing responsive helpdesk service, stable networks and reliable IT systems.

The HR team is at the forefront of building the talent capabilities of our organisation. Like us, you have a passion for people, culture and events. You take pride in providing and ensuring a first class employee experience for your colleagues.

**Job Description**

- Collaborate with recruiters to understand job requirements and actively source suitable candidates
- Conduct talent mapping to analyze the talent landscape and identify potential candidates. Utilize various sourcing channels to attract talent
- Provide end to end support of key recruitment activities including sourcing, screening resumes, facilitating interviews, planning logistics and coordinating candidate communications
- Support the team in internal engagement events
- Assist in preparing communication materials for internal communication channels
- Support in ad-hoc tasks and projects for other HR verticals as required

**Requirements**

- Students majoring in Human Resources Management, Business Administration, or IT equivalent field
- Strong organizational skills and excellent attention to detail
- Proactive and resourceful approach to problem solving
- Meticulous with a keen eye for details and organized
- Excellent interpersonal, verbal and written communication skills
- Able to work independently in a fast-paced and dynamic environment

company_object.name: Sea
company_object.long_description:
Sea is a global technology company in Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Brazil. Our mission is to better the lives of the consumers and small businesses of our region with technology.

Our businesses include:

Shopee, the largest pan-regional e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan, and a leading platform in Brazil. Launched in 2015, Shopee was designed to be mobile-first and highly social, offering buyers and sellers a trusted and enjoyable shopping experience. In 2024, Shopee recorded close to 11 billion orders, and a GMV of over $100 billion.

Garena, a global leading online games developer and publisher with a global footprint across more than 160 markets. Free Fire, Garena’s self-developed mobile battle royale title, is the most downloaded mobile game in its genre for six consecutive years, and was also the world’s most downloaded mobile game in 2019, 2021, and again in 2023 and 2024. Garena exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles from global partners - such as Arena of Valor, Call of Duty: Mobile, and EA Sports FC Online - in selected markets globally. Garena is also a leading esports organiser and hosts some of the world’s biggest esports events.

Monee, a leading digital payments and financial services provider in Southeast Asia. Monee’s offerings include mobile wallet services, payment processing, credit, banking, and related digital financial services and products. These services and products are offered under ShopeePay, SPayLater, and other brands in the region.

Sea is a Singapore company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘SE’. Our IPO in October 2017 was the largest US public listing by a Southeast Asian technology company at the time.

data.description:
**About the Team:**
You will be part of Sea’s HQ Finance department, which plays an integral role in supporting the accounting and finance needs of our three core businesses (Garena, Shopee, Monee) and across our diverse regional market presence. Within the department, the HR function provides dedicated support to Finance employees across recruitment, engagement, development, performance management, and other related areas. You will be supporting the Finance employees on employee engagements and people operations matters.
  
  
**Job Description:**

- Ensure seamless operational execution for onboarding and induction, including working closely with corporate teams, welcoming new employees on their first day, conducting office tours and new joiner orientations
- Ensure adherence to HR policies, local labour requirements, and documentation standard
- Own HR data integrity across people management platforms and ticketing tools; perform audits and periodic quality checks
- Support rollouts of policy/process changes through communications, training, and updates to knowledge content platforms
- Establish and maintain SOPs, knowledge articles, templates, and standard work for consistent delivery
- Contribute effective and creative solutions as the department designs a strategic and refreshing blueprint for engaging our employees
- Identify pain points and implement process enhancements through standardization, automation, and self-service enablement
- Partner with HRBPs and various stakeholders to deliver improvements and ensure positive employee experience
- Support in the brainstorming and execution of a variety of internal engagement events such as townhall, department-wide activities, etc. to deliver first class employee engagement events
- Assist in other engagement projects and support in tasks and projects for other HR verticals

**Requirements:**

- Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration or a relevant field
- Minimum 1 years of relevant working experience in HR field
- Able to work independently with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced and dynamic environment
- Strong coordination and project management skills
- Proactive and embodies a spirit of excellence with strong service attitude
- Creative thinker who strives for continuous improvement, innovation and quality
- Energetic, engaging with ability to motivate and inspire in a matrixed environment
- Passionate about people, culture, and events
- Meticulous with a keen eye for details

data.job_title: Senior Back End Engineer (Enterprise Efficiency) - Sea Labs
data.description:
**About the Team:**
**About Sea Labs Indonesia**
Sea Labs is at the core of the Sea platforms development, supporting diverse business lines from e-commerce, supply chain, games, payment, and finance, among many others. The strong growth and unique positioning of Sea's e-commerce business, Shopee, spurred the launch of Sea Labs Indonesia. Since its inception, the group of passionate engineers has charted the course to drive the best experience for our users in Indonesia, many of which solutions are even adapted to other markets in the region.
  
  
Sea's hyper-growing business scale has transformed most "innocent" problems into huge technical challenges, and there is no better place to experience world-class projects first-hand if you love technologies as much as we do. Together with our passionate and driven teams, you'll get to develop your skills, build on industry knowledge, and collaborate with global teams in a dynamic space. Browse our Sea Labs Indonesia team openings to see how you can make an impact with us.
  
  
**About Team**
The Enterprise Efficiency team is dedicated to transforming workplace productivity through seamless integration of enterprise communication, open platform capabilities, and management systems covering HR, finance, and operational tools. Our products power the daily workflows of thousands of employees across Sea group companies.
  
  
Our product lines include SeaTalk (enterprise communication and collaboration platform) and PFMS (people and financial management system). We are currently driving enterprise initiatives where we actively leverage AI-powered tools and LLM integrations to enhance product capabilities and accelerate engineering workflows.
  
  
**Job Description:**

- Design and implement reliable, performant, and scalable backend systems.
- Write high-quality, clean, and maintainable code using engineering best practices.
- Collaborate with product managers, frontend engineers, and QA teams across the full development lifecycle.
- Lead technical design discussions and produce thorough technical design documents.
- Conduct constructive code reviews that improve team-wide code quality.
- Integrate AI/LLM capabilities into backend services where applicable, including prompt engineering, API integration, and output handling.
- Mentor junior and mid-level engineers through code reviews, pair programming, and knowledge sharing.
- Proactively identify technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and reliability issues – then drive solutions.
- Communicate technical constraints and trade-offs clearly to non-technical stakeholders.

**Requirements:**

- 5+ years of backend development experience (Java, Go, or Python preferred)
- Strong understanding of distributed systems, microservices architecture, and API design
- Proven ability to produce well-structured, maintainable, and testable code with minimal defects
- Experience with relational databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL) and caching layers (Redis)
- Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and deployment best practices
- Able to perform thorough, constructive code reviews that improve team code quality
- Proficient in using AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude) to accelerate coding, debugging, testing, and documentation workflows
- General AI literacy – understands core AI/LLM concepts and can evaluate where AI capabilities can be practically applied to improve product features or engineering processes
- Experience with message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ) and event-driven architecture
- Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP)
- Hands-on experience integrating AI/LLM APIs into backend services (e.g., prompt engineering, API integration, output parsing)

Nice-to-Have Technical Skills
  
  

- Experience building enterprise B2B or internal tooling products (e.g., ERP, communication platforms)
- Performance tuning and optimization experience at scale

data.description:
**About the Team:**
Sea Labs Indonesia is the tech force behind Sea Group. We are here to make a real impact for millions of users in Indonesia through the transformative power of technology. We solve real-life problems to create a good user experience through various business operations, mainly Shopee and Monee.
  
  
**Job Description:**
In Sea Labs Indonesia we aim to develop Digital Talents in and for Indonesia. As part of our commitment, we are opening a Labs Bootcamp program for young talents with a passion for software engineering. Through this bootcamp, individuals will get exposure on working in a global organisation, as well as obtain knowledge and training to flourish the role in one of tracks as Software Engineer.
  
  
The Labs Bootcamp is a twenty-week program that covers software engineering, quality assurance, and site reliability engineer fundamentals, best coding practices on common tech stacks and tools used in the enterprise development center, and near-the-job training through simulated projects by the end of the program.
  
  
**Only candidates who pass the technical test and interview will be enrolled in the program.**
Exceptional performance during the program will have the opportunity to enroll in the selection process to become a permanent employee and build a career in Sea Labs Indonesia.
  
  
**Batch 9**
Starting Date: 13 July 2026
  
  
**Requirements:**

- Final year student or Bachelor’s Degree from any majors
- Passionate and interested in pursuing a career in software development and programming
- Have a good logical thinking and reasoning ability
- Willing to be located in Jakarta and participate in the Bootcamp Program offline (Monday to Friday)

Note: This program is free of charge and each participant will get a monthly allowance throughout the training period. A full commitment in attending the full-day class is mandatory.

data.description:
**About the Team:**
Our Infrastructure team provides the end-to-end managed services and solutions for the entire Group’s internet infrastructure alongside running business applications. We excel in building the architecture, providing solutions, deployment and operations of data centers, connectivity, cloud, networking, servers, system, storage, software, platforms, communications and security. We are a proud provider of high-quality and stable running business applications and services to our business units.
  
  
With the increasing scale and complexity of infrastructure planning and procurement, there is a critical need for strong governance, transparent cost management, and highly efficient operating processes. The Governance & Process Optimization (GPO) Lead is responsible for establishing robust governance frameworks, optimizing cost reporting and analytics, coordinating across multiple stakeholders, and driving productivity improvements across the Infrastructure organization through process excellence and AI-enabled tools. This role plays a central part in ensuring infrastructure investments are cost-efficient, well-governed, data-driven, and scalable, while supporting continuous business growth.
  
  
**Job Description:**
Governance & Cost Management
  
  

- Define, implement, and continuously improve governance frameworks for infrastructure planning, budgeting, and procurement activities.
- Oversee cost analysis and cost governance across infrastructure domains, including data centers, cloud services, connectivity, communication services, servers, and network-related expenditures (both Opex and Capex).
- Develop, review, and maintain should-cost models, cost baselines, and forecasting methodologies to ensure accuracy, consistency, and transparency.
- Ensure compliance with internal policies, financial controls, and procurement standards throughout the infrastructure lifecycle.

Cost Reporting & Business Insights
  
  

- Design and own standardized cost reporting, dashboards, and management views for infrastructure spend.
- Leverage BI tools (e.g., Power BI) to provide actionable insights, trend analysis, and executive-level reporting.
- Act as the single point of coordination to align cost data across Finance, Procurement, and Infrastructure domain teams.

Process Optimisation & Efficiency Enablement
  
  

- Identify and drive process improvements across infrastructure planning, sourcing, contracting, and reporting workflows.
- Standardize operating processes and documentation to improve efficiency, scalability, and auditability.
- Introduce and scale AI-enabled tools and automation to enhance productivity, data analysis, reporting accuracy, and decision-making efficiency across the team.

Stakeholder Management & Collaboration
  
  

- Work closely with cross-functional stakeholders, including Infrastructure domain teams, Business Units, Finance, BI, Legal, and Procurement.
- Facilitate alignment across multiple stakeholders with differing objectives, ensuring smooth execution and timely decision-making.
- Support leadership with structured analysis, clear recommendations, and high-quality business presentations.

Risk Management & Market Intelligence
  
  

- Identify, assess, and manage operational, financial, and compliance risks related to infrastructure spend and procurement activities.
- Conduct market research, vendor benchmarking, and trend analysis to support strategic sourcing and negotiation decisions.
- Provide insights on industry best practices to continuously strengthen governance and commercial effectiveness.

**Requirements:**

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Finance, Business, or a related discipline.
- Proven experience in governance, cost management, process optimization, procurement, or infrastructure strategy roles.
- Strong background in managing complex, cross-functional initiatives with multiple stakeholders.
- Experience supporting infrastructure-related domains (e.g., cloud, data centers, networks) is highly preferred.
- Strong analytical and structured problem-solving skills.
- Proficient in Power BI or similar analytics and visualization tools.
- Excellent presentation and communication skills, with the ability to translate complex data into clear business insights.
- Solid understanding of procurement processes, financial controls, and compliance concepts.
- Demonstrated interest or hands-on experience in applying AI tools or automation to improve work efficiency.

**Kindly note that you can only be considered for one role at a time with any of the companies within our Group. If you have applied for other jobs with the Group, you will be considered for roles in the order of your application.**

data.description:
**Job Description:**
We are seeking highly motivated individuals to join the Industrial Postgraduate Programme (IPP), a collaborative initiative between academia and industry. As an IPP candidate, you will pursue a PhD/Master degree while conducting applied research on a project co-developed with a sponsoring company and university. You will be jointly supervised by academic and industry mentors, and are expected to contribute to impactful solutions that address real-world challenges.
  
  
Responsibilities:
  
  

- Conduct in-depth research aligned with the company’s business and technological needs
- Collaborate closely with both academic and industry supervisors throughout the research
- Spend at least 50% of research time at the company’s premises
- Prepare and publish academic papers or technical reports where applicable
- Participate in regular reviews, seminars, and research milestone assessments
- Present findings to both academic and industry stakeholders

**Requirements:**

- Must be a Singapore Citizen or Singapore Permanent Resident (SPR)
- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in engineering, computing, science, or a related field
- Strong academic background and interest in applied research
- Full-time commitment for the duration of the program
- Alignment with the project’s research focus area
- Meet university admission requirements for postgraduate research degrees
- Strong problem-solving, analytical, and critical thinking skills
- Self-driven and capable of working independently and in cross-functional teams

data.description:
**About the Team:**
You will be part of a high-performing and dynamic team looking at the various financing transactions and special
  
  
projects for the brand and its subsidiaries to achieve its financial objectives.
  
  
**Job Description:**

- Supporting the structuring and execution of various strategic and financing initiatives
- Utilize financial modelling skills to analyze cash flows, assess risk factors, and optimize deal structures.
- Ongoing maintenance of structured financing transactions (such as ABS).
- Collaborate on the analysis and negotiation of strategic partnerships to secure long-term, sustainable capital that fuels our global expansion initiatives
- Any other special projects on an ad hoc basis on a group level.

**Requirements:**

- Bachelor’s Degree or higher in a finance or a related field
- Minimum 5 years of relevant full-time working experience in Debt Capital Markets (DCM) and/or Asset-backed Securities (ABS), preferably dealing with fintech lending companies
- Strong communication skills
- Ability to work with senior internal and external stakeholders

Within the department, the Internal Audit function in MariBank provides independent assurance across business, risk, and technology functions, safeguarding the Bank’s governance and internal control environment. You will contribute technical and analytical expertise to strategic ad-hoc projects and departmental initiatives, adapting to emerging organizational needs and evolving risk landscapes.

data.description:
Corporate IT is the backbone of our business. Our team helps Sea develop a competitive advantage through defining our technology objectives, assessing solution options, and devising technical solutions that help us achieve both strategic goals and meet operational requirements. As a part of our team, you’ll help deliver seamless IT experiences and support to our employees at Sea by providing responsive helpdesk service, stable networks and reliable IT systems.

We are looking for an IT professional to join our team in providing end user support and daily operations. As an IT Analyst, you will be responsible for implementing IT operations according to policy, interpret IT related issues on both System and User side to meet corporate requirements, and provide technical support in a fast-paced and demanding environment.

- Provide day-to-day technical support to end users and ensure the smooth running of computers, network devices and printers
- Troubleshoot and resolve end user application issues, maintain and update technical support documentation
- Handle asset management, maintain inventory and liaise with vendors
- Maintain and monitor office network infrastructure, IT security and antivirus tools
- Other duties include performing first level troubleshooting and support for scheduled server backups, system monitoring and reports
- In-depth knowledge of computer hardware, software, and OS (Windows and macOS)
- Understanding of TCP/IP, IP addressing and LAN technology including switching and routing fundamentals
- Hands-on experience in Windows server administration and basic knowledge in Linux server administration is a plus
- Knowledge of basic setup and configuration of Cisco devices such as firewall, switch, IP phones, wireless controller and access points is a plus
- Diploma or degree in Computer Sciences, Information Technology or a related field preferred

Garena exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles from global partners - such as Arena of Valor, Call of Duty: Mobile, and EA Sports FC Online - in selected markets globally. Garena is also a leading esports organiser and hosts some of the world’s biggest esports events.

Monee, a leading digital payments and financial services provider in Southeast Asia. Monee’s offerings include mobile wallet services, payment processing, credit, banking, and related digital financial services and products. These services and products are offered under ShopeePay, SPayLater, and other brands in the region.

Sea is a Singapore company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘SE’. Our IPO in October 2017 was the largest US public listing by a Southeast Asian technology company at the time.

data.description:
**About Team**

Corporate IT is the backbone of our business. Our team helps Sea develop a competitive advantage through defining our technology objectives, assessing solution options, and devising technical solutions that help us achieve both strategic goals and meet operational requirements. As a part of our team, you’ll help deliver seamless IT experiences and support to our employees at Sea by providing responsive helpdesk service, stable networks and reliable IT systems.

The HR team is at the forefront of building the talent capabilities of our organisation. Like us, you have a passion for people, culture and events. You take pride in providing and ensuring a first class employee experience for your colleagues.

**Job Description**

- Collaborate with recruiters to understand job requirements and actively source suitable candidates
- Conduct talent mapping to analyze the talent landscape and identify potential candidates. Utilize various sourcing channels to attract talent
- Provide end to end support of key recruitment activities including sourcing, screening resumes, facilitating interviews, planning logistics and coordinating candidate communications
- Support the team in internal engagement events
- Assist in preparing communication materials for internal communication channels
- Support in ad-hoc tasks and projects for other HR verticals as required

**Requirements**

- Students majoring in Human Resources Management, Business Administration, or IT equivalent field
- Strong organizational skills and excellent attention to detail
- Proactive and resourceful approach to problem solving
- Meticulous with a keen eye for details and organized
- Excellent interpersonal, verbal and written communication skills
- Able to work independently in a fast-paced and dynamic environment

company_object.name: Sea
company_object.long_description:
Sea is a global technology company in Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Brazil. Our mission is to better the lives of the consumers and small businesses of our region with technology.

Our businesses include:

Shopee, the largest pan-regional e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan, and a leading platform in Brazil. Launched in 2015, Shopee was designed to be mobile-first and highly social, offering buyers and sellers a trusted and enjoyable shopping experience. In 2024, Shopee recorded close to 11 billion orders, and a GMV of over $100 billion.

Garena, a global leading online games developer and publisher with a global footprint across more than 160 markets. Free Fire, Garena’s self-developed mobile battle royale title, is the most downloaded mobile game in its genre for six consecutive years, and was also the world’s most downloaded mobile game in 2019, 2021, and again in 2023 and 2024. Garena exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles from global partners - such as Arena of Valor, Call of Duty: Mobile, and EA Sports FC Online - in selected markets globally. Garena is also a leading esports organiser and hosts some of the world’s biggest esports events.

Monee, a leading digital payments and financial services provider in Southeast Asia. Monee’s offerings include mobile wallet services, payment processing, credit, banking, and related digital financial services and products. These services and products are offered under ShopeePay, SPayLater, and other brands in the region.

Sea is a Singapore company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘SE’. Our IPO in October 2017 was the largest US public listing by a Southeast Asian technology company at the time.
